actionBar.handTool.defaultMessage: Hand Tool (h) - pan and rotate the view without selecting objects

actionBar.rotateTool.defaultMessage: Rotate Tool (e) - Select and rotate objects

actionBar.rulerTool.defaultMessage: Ruler Tool (r) - Measure distances between points

actionBar.translateTool.defaultMessage: Translate Tool (w) - Select and move objects

addLayer.card.asphaltCircle.desc.defaultMessage: Add a large flat asphalt circle on the ground. Geometry and material can be changed in the properties panel.

addLayer.card.buildingBox.desc.defaultMessage: Add a simple box roughly the size of a 3-story building, sitting on the ground in a bright blue. A quick placeholder for blocking out buildings.

addLayer.card.buildingDemo.desc.defaultMessage: Demo street with buildings on both sides using the new fit mode for building placement

addLayer.card.concreteCylinder.desc.defaultMessage: Add a gray concrete cylinder roughly the size of an interstate highway support pillar. A quick placeholder for elevated-roadway columns.

addLayer.card.driveableDeliveryRobot.des.defaultMessage: A small-chassis driveable bot (~Starship/Serve-sized) with a procedural mesh + dynamic antenna. Like real delivery robots, it cannot mount standard 6" curbs. Switch presets from the drive-controls properties panel.

addLayer.card.driveableTaxi.desc.defaultMessage: A full-size sedan with real-car physics (~Camry-sized). Mounts standard curbs with momentum, hits real-world speeds. Switch presets from the drive-controls properties panel.

addLayer.card.driveableTukTuk.desc.defaultMessage: A small three-wheeler-style driveable vehicle with the tuk-tuk catalog mesh. Can mount curbs at speed. Switch presets from the drive-controls properties panel.

addLayer.card.grassBox.desc.defaultMessage: Add a large green ground slab with animated instanced grass. The box dimensions, color, and grass options (density, blade height) are all editable in the properties panel.

addLayer.card.highlightRing.desc.defaultMessage: Add a bright red ring, big enough to circle and highlight a real-world element like a vehicle, tree, or part of a lane.

addLayer.card.managedStreet150124.desc.defaultMessage: Premade Street 150ft Right of Way / 124ft Roadway Width

addLayer.card.managedStreet4024.desc.defaultMessage: Premade Street 40ft Right of Way / 24ft Roadway Width

addLayer.card.managedStreet6036.desc.defaultMessage: Premade Street 60ft Right of Way / 36ft Roadway Width

addLayer.card.managedStreet8056.desc.defaultMessage: Premade Street 80ft Right of Way / 56ft Roadway Width

addLayer.card.managedStreet9470.desc.defaultMessage: Premade Street 94ft Right of Way / 70ft Roadway Width

addLayer.card.managedStreetmix.desc.defaultMessage: Create a new street from Streetmix URL using the Managed Street component.

addLayer.card.managedStreetplan.desc.defaultMessage: Create a new street from Streetplan URL using the Managed Street component.

addLayer.card.panoramaSphere.desc.defaultMessage: Create an immersive 360° environment from a panoramic image for AR/VR experiences.

addLayer.card.raceTarget.desc.defaultMessage: A finish-line gate. Driving the player vehicle through it during play ends the race, pauses the simulation, and pins the finish time in the toolbar.

addLayer.card.streetmixStreet.desc.defaultMessage: Create an additional Streetmix street in your 3DStreet scene without replacing any existing streets.

addLayer.card.svgExtruded.desc.defaultMessage: Create entity with svg-extruder component, that accepts a svgString and creates a new entity with geometry extruded from the svg and applies the default mixin material grass.

addLayer.card.torusKnot.desc.defaultMessage: Add a polished metallic torus knot. A decorative primitive that shows off the geometry and material (metalness/roughness) controls in the properties panel.

addLayer.card.trafficReplay.desc.defaultMessage: Replay anonymized real-world street users from a traffic-sensor manifest (JSON). Attaches to your Managed Street; press Play to watch real traffic by mode.

addLayer.card.uploadImage.desc.defaultMessage: Upload an image (sign, reference photo, custom map, etc.) from your device and place it in the scene.

addLayer.card.uploadModel.desc.defaultMessage: Upload a glTF or GLB model from your device. It is rendered immediately and saved to your asset library.

addLayer.card.uploadSplat.desc.defaultMessage: Upload a Gaussian Splat (.splat, .ply, .spz, .rad) from your device and place it in the scene.

addLayer.onlyFirstFileAdded.defaultMessage: Only the first file was added. Drop one file at a time.

addLayer.unsupportedFileType.defaultMessage: Unsupported file type: {fileName}. Supported formats: GLB, GLTF, JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, PLY, SPLAT, SPZ.

aiChatPanel.inputPlaceholder.defaultMessage: Type a command or type /help for options

appMenu.export.dxfEmpty.defaultMessage: No managed-street segments found to export as DXF.

appMenu.export.dxfError.defaultMessage: Error while trying to save DXF file. Error: {error}

appMenu.export.gltfError.defaultMessage: Error while trying to save glTF file. Error: {error}

appMenu.export.pdfEmpty.defaultMessage: No managed-street segments found to export as PDF.

appMenu.export.pdfError.defaultMessage: Error while trying to save PDF file. Error: {error}

appMenu.export.uvTransformSkipped.defaultMessage: UV transformation skipped - using original export

appMenu.geojson.importSuccess.defaultMessage: GeoJSON file imported successfully. Found {count} polygon features.

appMenu.geojson.largeFileWarning.defaultMessage: GeoJSON file is {sizeKB}KB. Large files may affect performance.

appMenu.geojson.parseError.defaultMessage: Error parsing GeoJSON file. Please ensure it is valid JSON.

catalog.bus.description.defaultMessage: The New Flyer XD40 is a modern, stylish, and comfortable bus that is perfect for people in urban settings.

catalog.sp-furn-busstop-roundshelter-12x.defaultMessage: Bus stop rounded shelter with people

catalog.sp-furn-table-blue-7x7ft.name.defaultMessage: Outdoor seating with umbrella and people

catalog.sp-light-flowerP-bannerBY-13ft.n.defaultMessage: Light pole 13 ft with purple flowers and blue & yellow banners

catalog.sp-light-flowerY-bannerRG-13ft.n.defaultMessage: Light pole 13 ft with yellow flowers and red & green banners

common.useGeoTokensTooltip.defaultMessage: Use geo tokens to set or change a geolocation for your scene.

deploymentBanner.message.defaultMessage: You're using a forked or self-hosted build of 3DStreet (open source, AGPL-3.0). Local editing works, but cloud features are unavailable. To use cloud services, visit <link>3dstreet.app</link>.

driveControls.tipKeys.defaultMessage: Space = brake · R = reset · C = camera mode

driveControls.tipPreset.defaultMessage: Pick a preset to swap mesh + physics in one shot, or hand-tune fields below

driveControls.tipStart.defaultMessage: Press Start, then drive with WASD / arrows

editorUpgradeModal.alreadyPro.defaultMessage: You're already a Pro member — try that action again to continue.

exportModal.arReadyHint.defaultMessage: Omits people, vehicles and geospatial layers for augmented reality apps.

exportModal.betaNote.defaultMessage: Beta format: the preview is exactly what you'll download.

exportModal.dxfDescription.defaultMessage: Download a 2D plan view of this scene's streets as a .dxf file for use in AutoCAD and other CAD tools.

exportModal.generatePreviewHint.defaultMessage: Builds the .glb in your browser; this may take a few seconds on large scenes.

exportModal.glbDescription.defaultMessage: Download this scene as a .glb 3D model file for use in Blender, Unreal, and other 3D tools.

exportModal.jsonDescription.defaultMessage: Download this scene as a .3dstreet.json file to back up your work or import into another 3DStreet account.

exportModal.jsonTruncated.defaultMessage: Preview truncated. The downloaded file contains the full scene.

exportModal.pdfDescription.defaultMessage: Download a 2D plan view of this scene's streets as a vector .pdf file, ready to print or publish.

exportModal.planEmpty.defaultMessage: No street segments to draw yet. Add a street layer to see a plan preview.

exportModal.previewError.defaultMessage: Could not generate the preview. Please try again.

exportModal.proDownloadHint.defaultMessage: Preview is free. Downloading requires 3DStreet Pro.

geoModal.geojsonTipMarker.defaultMessage: The red marker shows the calculated center of your imported buildings

geoModal.geojsonTipSetLocation.defaultMessage: Click 'Set Location' to position your scene at this location

geoModal.outOfTokensProIncludes.defaultMessage: Pro includes unlimited geo lookups, map access, and more

geoModal.outOfTokensSetChange.defaultMessage: Set and change scene locations as often as you need

geoModal.outOfTokensUpgrade.defaultMessage: Upgrade to 3DStreet Pro for unlimited geospatial features

geoModal.outOfTokensUsedAll.defaultMessage: You've used all your free geo tokens

geoModal.setLocationFailed.defaultMessage: Failed to set scene location. Please try again.

geoModal.tipChoosePoint.defaultMessage: Choose a point that is easy to identify visually from aerial view such as utility pole, road marking, crosswalk ramp, or other landmark

geoModal.tipClickMap.defaultMessage: Click on the map to change the location of the red marker point

geoModal.tipMarkerOrigin.defaultMessage: The red marker sets the geospatial location for the centerpoint origin of the scene

geoModal.tipZoomIn.defaultMessage: Zoom in as much as possible when placing point to ensure accurate scene alignment

geoModal.upgradeToChangeLocation.defaultMessage: Upgrade to Pro to Change Location

geoModal.upgradeUnlimitedAccess.defaultMessage: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access

geoSidebar.usesFreeTokens.defaultMessage: Uses 1 of {geoToken} free geo tokens to add real-world map data.

help.action.rotateMap.title.defaultMessage: Rotate the map by right-clicking and dragging

help.action.zoomMap.description.defaultMessage: Use the mouse scrollwheel (or touchpad scrolling motion) to zoom in and out.

jobHealthModal.adminsOnly.defaultMessage: Admins only. Sign in with an admin account to view background-job health.

jobHealthModal.footerNote.defaultMessage: Heartbeats are written on each scheduled run. A red row that says “stale” means the schedule isn’t firing. Expand a row to copy its summary/error for diagnosis.

managedStreetSidebar.convertToShapesConf.defaultMessage: This turns the street into plain 3D shapes you can move, duplicate, and delete individually. After you save and reload this scene you cannot undo this action. Tip: duplicate the street first if you want to keep a copy of this managed street.

managedStreetSidebar.reloadConfirm.defaultMessage: Reload this street from {source}? Local segment edits will be lost.
